libtooltips.configuration.line_before.to: Adds an empty line BEFORE the description, AFTER the [shift]
libtooltips.configuration.line_after.too: Adds an empty line AFTER the description
Which color to use as a base for the tooltip. The value is the color as an integer (use an online color picker)
libtooltips.configuration.title: LibTooltip's Config
tooltip.namespace.path.1: You can add more lines by just simply doing .1 .2 etc!
tooltip.namespace.path.2: This library uses TysonTheEmber's awesome text API,
tooltip.namespace.path.3: meaning you can do lots of <grad hue=true from=330000 to=333300 f=0.3>Fancy Stuff!</grad>
tooltip.namespace.path.4: Check their docs at tysontheember.dev to learn more!
tooltip.always.namespace.path.0: This tooltip will always show, even without shift being pressed!
